title: Temporomandibular disorder - NHS
text:
issue a psychologist, if stress and anxiety are making your pain worse a physiotherapist, for advice about jaw exercises and massage If these treatments do not help, you may be referred to a specialist in joint problems to discuss other options, such as painkilling injections or surgery.
Causes of temporomandibular disorder (TMD) 
Temporomandibular disorder (TMD) can be caused by:
teeth grinding wear and tear of the joint a blow to the head or face stress an uneven bite
